div1.entryFree: Varnish, vb. to set a gloss on, to give a fair and fresh appearance to: beauty doth v. age, LLL IV, 3, 244 (makes old people appear young again). Christian fools with --ed faces, Merch. II, 5, 33 (== painted). to be new --ed, II, 9, 49. only painted, like his --ed friends, Tim. IV, 2, 36.
